description: Transform a face (via its points). If < range > is not specified all faces are transformed.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.syntax: building-blocks face transform <origin v_o > <control-point b > keyword <range>
7.0.description: Transform a face (via its points). If <range> is not specified all faces are transformed.

keywords.name: reflect
keywords.description: Make a reflection transformation about a plane.

keywords.name: reflect-dip
keywords.description: Specify the mirror plane defined by dip angle f1 and dip direction f2. Angles are defined in degrees.

keywords.name: reflect-plane
keywords.description: Specify the mirror plane defined by three points v_1 v_2 v_3.

keywords.name: rotate
keywords.description: Rotate by angle f, in degrees, using rotation axes that go through the coordinate origin in the direction v.

keywords.name: scale
keywords.description: Scale the point positions by expanding or contracting their distance from the origin by a factor of v in the \(x\)-, \(y\)-, and \(z\)-directions, respectively.

keywords.name: translate
keywords.description: Perform a translation — adding v to each coordinate point of the face to be transformed.

keywords.name: reflect-plane
keywords.description: Make a reflection transformation about a plane. Specify the mirror plane defined by dip angle f1 and dip direction f2 . Angles are defined in degrees. Specify the mirror plane defined by three points v_1 v_2 v_3 .

keywords.name: rotate
keywords.description: Rotate by angle f , in degrees, using rotation axes that go through the coordinate origin in the direction v .

keywords.name: scale
keywords.description: Scale the point positions by expanding or contracting their distance from the origin by a factor of v in the \(x\) -, \(y\) -, and \(z\) -directions, respectively.

keywords.name: translate
keywords.description: Perform a translation — adding v to each coordinate point of the face to be transformed.
